queryText:
SELECT
  "VendorID",
  tpep_pickup_datetime,
  tpep_dropoff_datetime,
  passenger_count,
  trip_distance,
  "PULocationID",
  "DOLocationID",
  fare_amount,
  tip_amount,
  total_amount
FROM yellow_taxi
LIMIT 100000
